title: escallonia rosea var. hollermayeriana
intro: Escallonia rosea var. hollermayeriana, also known as Escallonia 'Hollermayeriana', is a flowering plant species within the Escalloniaceae family, characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and compact growth habit. This plant is valued for its potential medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Escallonia rosea var. hollermayeriana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
